title: Eminence
description:
An Expansive Mod-Pack that seeks to renew Minecraft in It's Entirety
| Tested with a RTX 2060 and an I7 12700k | 200+ Mods
body:
# Welcome to the Eminence Mod-Pack
![Eminence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bfe2fb09faeb4e1ad0136f768b9f37fdbc4e75f.png)

## An Expansive Mod-Pack that seeks to renew Minecraft in It's Entirety 

| Tested with a **RTX 2060** and an **I7 12700K** | **200+ Mods**

*FPS may stutter at launch

### Are you ready for a Mind-Numbing experience? Are you ready for the thrill of adrenaline pumping through your veins? Well you're in the right place !


This is an all in one, expansize, **Medieval** themed mod pack, filled with new challenges !
Explore beatifully generated worlds, expansive oceans and **3 New Dimensions** all meant to balance out progression with spicy new features.

### Are you a souls veteran?
For all you **Elden Ring** and **Dark Souls** fans, well lucky you, as we've set the difficulty to extreme ! In order to survive even the weakest of foes, you will need to stack up with **powerful equipment**, and even make some friends along the way !

### Navigation avid?
Are you ready to **set sail** and explore vestiges of past? Look out for ship scaffoldings around the coast, who knows, maybe you'll find your next ride! Do stay clear of **ruins** during your exploration on the other hand, certain things would do better to stay uncovered...

![Sailing and Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab7f415dd2dcf8f19b49ded5199acf31c5d5a6e_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
-Equipement Overhaul

-Progression Overhaul

-Difficuly Increase

-New Biomes & Dimensions

-Revised UI & Textures (To be completed)

-Performance Boost

-World generation overhaul

-Multiplayer (to be tested)

-Other small Qol Features, and extras (Like Boats :P)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

As of version 1.7 of this Mod-pack has been ported to Forge 1.20.1, Sadly your old worlds will not be compatible with this update.

Off platform Mods can be found here : 

Acedium (Forge port of Nvidium) :[Acedium](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium)

Catalogue : [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)

Configured : [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)

</details>



## If you have any questions/feedback please go to the linked discord where i will try to respond (if i can)
